outcome_contract.why: Live audit on 2026-03-13 found these bugs causing incorrect bleeper assignments during bar shifts — staff can't reliably use Go mode, COMP eligibility is wrong, Firebase errors are silent, and the UI misleads. All 6 defects confirmed in source code.
outcome_contract.intended_outcome_statement: All 6 confirmed bar/bleeper defects resolved: Go mode correctly skips bleeper reservation, COMP screen filters to tonight only, Firebase write failures are surfaced to staff, bleep number field initialises clean, ticket list renders stably without key churn, placeholder text matches actual behaviour.

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: `PaymentSection.tsx` placeholder text; bleep # field display value
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Bug 8: misleading placeholder. Bug 6: field shows number on load
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Fix placeholder copy; remove auto-fill effect

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Go/Bleep toggle in Pay modal; COMP eligibility display
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Bug 3: Go state ignored in payment logic; Bug 4: COMP eligibility wrong date

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: `useBleeperMutations` logs error to console but caller ignores return
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Bug 5: Firebase write failure is silent to staff
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Add result check + notify on failure

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Existing tests in `OrderTakingContainer.test.tsx`, `CompScreen.preorder.test.tsx`; no tests for TicketItems or PaymentSection
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Coverage gaps for all 6 bug paths
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Add unit tests for each fixed path

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: `BleeperResult` return type is documented but not used at call site
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Bug 5: contract violated at call site

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Bug 7: React key churn on every render
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Fix key to use index fallback

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Local `apps/reception` app; Firebase data persists independently
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: None — changes are pure client-side logic except Bug 5 notification
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Standard Git revert path; no migration needed

stage_payload.scope_summary: Six confirmed defects in the bar/bleeper subsystem of the reception app (`apps/reception`), all discovered in a live audit on 2026-03-13. The bugs collectively break the "Bleep vs Go" payment flow, silently assign bleep numbers when staff intend Go, show incorrect preorder eligibility on the COMP screen, hide Firebase write errors, display stale state on page load, cause unnecessary React remounts, and show misleading UI text.
goals: Produce a precise, evidence-backed plan for fixing all 6 bugs.
Ensure fixes are consistent across the shared `bleepNumber`/`usage` state.
Add or update unit tests for each corrected code path.
non_goals: Adding new bleeper features (e.g. multiple orders per bleeper).
Fixing unrelated bar issues not in this work package.
constraints: Firebase write API for bleepers is `useBleeperMutations.setBleeperAvailability` — callers may not bypass it.
assumptions: The Go mode is intended to seat a guest without reserving any physical bleeper.
`firstAvailableBleeper` from `useBleepersData` is the canonical source of the next free bleeper.
The `useEffect` in `OrderTakingContainer` that auto-fills `bleepNumber` state is redundant with `PaymentSection`'s `displayNumber` computed value, and should be removed.
key_entry_points: `apps/reception/src/components/bar/orderTaking/OrderTakingContainer.tsx` — container for order-taking flow including bleeper state, payment confirmation

rehearsal_issues.Issues Found: Keys are ordinal `night1/night2` (confirmed `preorderData.ts`); fix requires `checkInDate` param + night-index computation; utilities exist in `ModalPreorderDetails.tsx`

rehearsal_issues.Scope Area: Bug 6 — auto-fill useEffect interaction with PaymentSection

rehearsal_issues.Issues Found: All 6 paths untested; TicketItems + PaymentSection have no test files
rehearsal_issues.Resolution Required: Tests to be created in plan

process_topology.trigger: Staff member opens the Bar screen, takes an order, and proceeds to payment.
process_topology.end_condition: Order is confirmed, Firebase is updated (sale recorded, bleeper marked in-use if applicable), UI resets for next order.

areas.label: Payment confirmation
areas.flow: Staff selects Bleep or Go toggle → enters bleep number or leaves blank → taps Pay. `doConfirmPayment` in OrderTakingContainer reads `usage` and `bleepNumber`, calls `chooseNext()` regardless of usage, writes to Firebase
areas.issues: Go mode silently assigns a bleeper; Firebase write failure is not surfaced

areas.label: COMP screen eligibility
areas.flow: Staff opens COMP screen; system checks `preorder` Firebase data per occupant to show who is eligible tonight
areas.issues: Checks all nights' preorder data, not just tonight — shows guests as eligible even when their preorder is for a different date

areas.label: Bleep # field initialisation
areas.flow: On page load (or navigation to /bar), `bleepNumber` state starts `""`, useEffect auto-fills from `firstAvailableBleeper`
areas.issues: Field shows "5" (or whatever next available is) on fresh load even though no order has started; placeholder contradicts auto-fill

areas.label: Ticket item rendering
areas.flow: Ticket list renders items with `key={it.id ?? crypto.randomUUID()}`
areas.issues: Items without an `id` get a new UUID on every render → remounts on any state change
